content:
✨ sshx | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Collaborative live terminal sharing for remote work, debugging, and pair programming.
✨ Key Features: • Run a single command to share your terminal • Resize, move windows, and freely zoom and pan on an infinite canvas • See other people's cursors moving in real time • Connect to the nearest server in a globally distributed mesh • End-to-end encryption with Argon2 and AES
📖 Summary: sshx is a Rust-based tool for secure, collaborative live terminal sharing over the web. It allows multiple users to interact with a shared terminal session in real-time, featuring end-to-end encryption and a globally distributed server network for low latency.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 meshgen | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling users to control and manipulate 3D models and scenes within Blender using natural language commands processed by AI agents.
✨ Key Features: • AI agent control of Blender via natural language • Multiple backend options: local (llama.cpp, Ollama), remote (Hugging Face, Anthropic, OpenAI) • Optional LLaMA-Mesh integration for local mesh understanding • Optional Hyper3D integration for high-fidelity mesh generation
📖 Summary: MeshGen is a Blender add-on that allows users to control Blender functionalities using natural language commands interpreted by AI agents. It supports various local and remote AI model backends for inference, enhancing creative workflows by integrating AI directly into the 3D modeling process.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ claudecode-telegram | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enable users to interact with and receive responses from Claude Code through a familiar Telegram interface.
✨ Key Features: • Telegram bot integration for Claude Code • Message injection into Claude Code via tmux • Response retrieval from Claude Code's transcript • Setup via Cloudflare Tunnel for external access • Bot commands for status, clearing, resuming, and looping
📖 Summary: claudecode-telegram is a Python-based bridge that connects Telegram to Claude Code, allowing users to interact with Claude Code by sending messages through a Telegram bot. It leverages tmux and Cloudflare Tunnel to facilitate this communication, enabling responses to be sent back to Telegram.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 ProcessHacker | C
🎯 Primary Use Case: Monitoring system resources, debugging software, and detecting malware on Windows.
✨ Key Features: • Detailed system activity overview with highlighting • Graphs and statistics for resource hog tracking • File usage detection • Network connection monitoring • Real-time disk access information
📖 Summary: System Informer is a free, open-source tool for Windows that provides detailed system monitoring, software debugging, and malware detection capabilities. It offers real-time insights into system activity, resource usage, network connections, and file access, allowing users to manage processes and services effectively.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
